segments.text: MAN: Greek Island Holidays, can I help you?
segments.translation: 男士：希腊岛屿旅游，我能帮到您吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, I hope so. I have a friend who's just come back from Corfu and she's recommended some apartments in Arilas.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，我希望是。我也有一个朋友刚从科孚岛回来，并且她推荐了一些阿里拉斯的公寓。

segments.text: She thought they might be on your list.
segments.translation: 她觉得你们单子上应该有这些地方。

segments.text: MAN: Arilas, Arilas, let me see.
segments.translation: 男士：阿里拉斯，阿里拉斯，让我看看。

segments.text: Can you give me the names?
segments.translation: 你可以告诉我名字吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, the first's Rose Garden Apartments.
segments.translation: 女士：可以，第一个是玫瑰花园公寓。

segments.text: I'd like to go with another friend in the last week of October.
segments.translation: 我希望在十月的最后一周和一个朋友去。

segments.text: MAN: Well, we've got a lovely studio flat available at that time.
segments.translation: 男士：嗯，我们有一个不错的单间公寓在那个时候可租。

segments.text: I'm sure you'd enjoy the entertainment programme there too, with Greek dancing in the restaurant.
segments.translation: 我确定你也会喜欢那里的娱乐节目，在餐厅里有希腊舞蹈。

segments.text: WOMAN: And the cost for each of us?
segments.translation: 女士：那每人花费如何？

segments.text: WOMAN: That sounds very reasonable!
segments.translation: 女士：听起来挺合理！

segments.text: I'm just jotting down some notes.
segments.translation: 我先记下一些笔记。

segments.text: Now the second one she mentioned was called Blue Bay.
segments.translation: 现在，她提到的第二个叫做蓝色海湾。

segments.text: MAN: Blue Bay? Yes, in fact that's very popular and it has some special features.
segments.translation: 男士：蓝色海湾？是的，事实上很受欢迎，它有一些特别之处。

segments.text: WOMAN: Really?
segments.translation: 女士：真的吗？

segments.text: MAN: The main attraction is the large swimming pool with salt water.
segments.translation: 男士：最主要的吸引人之处是大盐水游泳池。

segments.text: WOMAN: Much healthier, I understand.
segments.translation: 女士：更健康，我明白。

segments.text: MAN: That's right. And it isn't far from the beach, either - only 300 metres, and only around half a kilometre to some shops, so you don't have to be too energetic.
segments.translation: 男士：对的。它也离海滩很近，只有300米，距离一些商店也不过半公里，所以你不需要太精力充沛。

segments.text: WOMAN: Is it much more expensive than the first one?
segments.translation: 女士：比第一个贵很多吗？

segments.text: MAN: Let me just check. I think at the time you want to go it's around £260 - no £275 to be exact.
segments.translation: 男士：让我看看。我想在你想去的时间，差不多是260镑，不对，准确说275镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right, I've got that.
segments.translation: 女士：好的，我记下了。

segments.text: Now there are just two more apartments to ask you about.
segments.translation: 现在只剩两个需要问你的。

segments.text: Um, I can't read my own writing!
segments.translation: 嗯，我看不懂我自己写的了！

segments.text: Something to do with sun … Sunshine, is it?
segments.translation: 与太阳有关的什么……阳光，是吗？

segments.text: MAN: I think you meant the Sunshade Apartments.
segments.translation: 男士：我想你指的是遮阳公寓。

segments.text: They're on a mountainside.
segments.translation: 那在山坡上。

segments.text: WOMAN: Any special features?
segments.translation: 女士：有什么特点吗?

segments.text: MAN: Yes, each room has its own sun terrace and there are shared barbecue facilities.
segments.translation: 男士：对，每个房间都有自己的阳光露台，并且还有公共的烧烤设施。

segments.text: WOMAN: Sounds lovely!
segments.translation: 女士：听起来很棒！

segments.text: MAN: Yes, it is rather well-equipped.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，它设施非常不错。

segments.text: It also provides water sports - it has its own beach.
segments.translation: 它也提供水上运动，它有自己的海滩的。

segments.text: There are facilities for water-skiing.
segments.translation: 还有滑水的设施。

segments.text: WOMAN: Any kite-surfing? My friend's quite keen.
segments.translation: 女士：有风筝冲浪吗？我朋友特喜欢。

segments.text: MAN: Not at the hotel but I'm sure you'll find some in Arilas.
segments.translation: 男士：酒店没有，但我确定你可以在阿里拉斯找到一些。

segments.text: There's also satellite TV in the apartments.
segments.translation: 公寓里也有卫星电视的。

segments.text: WOMAN: And how much is that one?
segments.translation: 女士：那这个多少钱？

segments.text: MAN: £490 with two sharing.
segments.translation: 男士：两人共享的话，490镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: You mean £245 each?
segments.translation: 女士：你是说245镑一人吗？

segments.text: MAN: I'm afraid not! Each person has to pay that amount and there must be at least two in an apartment.
segments.translation: 男士：恐怕不是！一个人需要付那么多，并且至少要两个人入住公寓。

segments.text: WOMAN: I don't think that would be within our budget, unfortunately.
segments.translation: 女士：不幸的是我觉得那已经超出我们的预算了。

segments.text: And the last one sounds a bit expensive too - the Grand!
segments.translation: 还有最后这个看起来有点贵，格兰德！

segments.text: MAN: Actually it's quite reasonable.
segments.translation: 男士：实际上很合理的。

segments.text: It's an older style house with Greek paintings in every room, and a balcony outside.
segments.translation: 这是一个旧式建筑，每个房间都有希腊画作，外边还有阳台。

segments.text: WOMAN: Sounds nice. What are the views like?
segments.translation: 女士：听起来不错。风景如何呢？

segments.text: MAN: Well, there are forests all round and they hide a supermarket just down the road, so that's very useful for all your shopping needs.
segments.translation: 男士：嗯，周围有森林，并且沿路还有一个超市，所以这对你的购物需求很有用的。

segments.text: There's a disco in the area too.
segments.translation: 这个区域还有舞厅。

segments.text: WOMAN: And the price?
segments.translation: 女士：那价格呢？

segments.text: MAN: £319 at that time, but if you leave it till November it goes down by 40%.
segments.translation: 男士：319镑，在那个时间，但是如果你到11月再去的话，就会降价40%。

segments.text: WOMAN: Too late, I'm afraid.
segments.translation: 女士：恐怕太晚了。

segments.text: MAN: Well, why don't I send you a brochure with full details, Ms …?
segments.translation: 男士：嗯，何不让我给您寄一本小册子，里边有完整信息，您贵姓？

segments.text: WOMAN: Nash. But don't worry about that, I'm coming to Upminster soon and I'll call and get one.
segments.translation: 女士：纳什。不过不用担心这个，我最近会去阿普敏斯特，我会去一趟拿一本。

segments.text: I just wanted to get an idea first.
segments.translation: 我只想先了解一下。

segments.text: MAN: Well, that's fine. We've got plenty here when you come.
segments.translation: 男士：好的，很好。你来的时候，我们这里还有很多。

segments.text: WOMAN: If you've got a minute, could I just check a couple of points about insurance?
segments.translation: 女士：如果你有时间，我可否再问一些关于保险的事？

segments.text: I got one policy through the post but I'd like to see if yours is better.
segments.translation: 我通过邮购买了个保单，但我想看看你的是不是好点。

segments.text: MAN: Fine. What would you like to know?
segments.translation: 男士：好的。你想知道什么呢？

segments.text: WOMAN: Well, the one I've got has benefits and then the maximum amount you can claim.
segments.translation: 女士：嗯，我的这份有一些好处，也有你可以索赔的金额上限。

segments.text: Is that like yours?
segments.translation: 这和你们的一样吗？

segments.text: MAN: Yes, that's how most of them are.
segments.translation: 男士：是的，大多数保险都这样。

segments.text: WOMAN: Well, the first thing is cancellation.
segments.translation: 女士：嗯，第一件事是取消政策。

segments.text: If the holiday's cancelled on the policy I've got, you can claim £8,000.
segments.translation: 按我们的政策，如果假期取消，可以索赔8000镑。

segments.text: MAN: We can improve on that, Ms Nash.
segments.translation: 男士：我们还可以再好点，纳什女士。

segments.text: For Greek Island holidays, our maximum is £10,000.
segments.translation: 对于希腊岛屿旅游，我们的上限是10000镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: That's good - of course our holiday won't even cost £1,000 together!
segments.translation: 女士：那太好了，当然我们的假期总额根本不会超过1000镑。

segments.text: MAN: It's still sensible to have good cover.
segments.translation: 男士：有好的保护政策还是很实际的。

segments.text: Now, if you go to hospital, we allow £600.
segments.translation: 现在，如果你去医院的话，我们可赔600镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: Yes, mine's similar.
segments.translation: 女士：是的，我的也差不多。

segments.text: MAN: And we also allow a relative to travel to your holiday resort.
segments.translation: 男士：并且我们也允许一位家人前往你的旅行地。

segments.text: WOMAN: My policy just says their representative will help you.
segments.translation: 女士：我的保险只说他们的代表会帮助你。

segments.text: MAN: You can see there's another difference there.
segments.translation: 男士：你可以看到还有另外一个区别。

segments.text: And what happens if you don't get on the plane?
segments.translation: 那如果没赶上飞机会怎么办？

segments.text: WOMAN: Nothing, as far as I can see on this form.
segments.translation: 女士：什么也没有，至少我从这表里看到是这样。

segments.text: MAN: Don't you have missed departure?
segments.translation: 男士：你难道没有过错过出发吗？

segments.text: WOMAN: No, I'll just jot that down.
segments.translation: 女士：没有，我记下来。

segments.text: MAN: We pay up to £1,000 for that, depending on the reason.
segments.translation: 男士：我们为此付最高1000镑的费用，这要根据发生的原因判断。

segments.text: And we're particularly generous about loss of personal belongings - up to £3,000, but not more than £500 for a single item.
segments.translation: 我们对个人物品的损失也很大方，赔付最高3000镑，不过每一件物品不超过500镑。

segments.text: WOMAN: Then I'd better not take my laptop!
segments.translation: 女士：那我最好别带我的笔记本！

segments.text: MAN: Not unless you insure it separately.
segments.translation: 男士：除非你单独为它买了保险。

segments.text: WOMAN: OK - thanks very much for your time - you've really been helpful.
segments.translation: 女士：好的。非常感激你，你帮了我很多。

segments.text: Can I get back to you? Your name is?
segments.translation: 我能再打给你吗？你的名字是？

segments.text: MAN: Ben - Ludlow. That's L-U-D-L-O-W.
segments.translation: 男士：本·路德楼。拼写为L-U-D-L-O-W。

segments.text: I'm the Assistant Manager here.
segments.translation: 我是这里的副经理。

segments.text: I'll give you my number.
segments.translation: 我给你我的号码。

segments.text: WOMAN: But didn't phone 081260 567294?
That's what I've got on the paper.
segments.translation: 这是我在报纸上看到的。

segments.text: MAN: That's the main switchboard.
segments.translation: 男士：那是总机号码。

segments.text: I've given you my direct line.
segments.translation: 我给你的是我的直拨号码。

segments.text: WOMAN: Right, thank you ...
segments.translation: 女士：好的，谢谢你……
